query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "Velocity IT". The company's official website domain is velocityit.net — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
## Executive Summary

Velocity IT (official domain: velocityit.net) is a Dallas, Texas-based managed IT services provider (MSP) founded in 2010 by Kenny Riley. The company primarily serves small to mid-sized businesses across Texas, offering cybersecurity, cloud migration, and infrastructure cabling. A critical finding for analysts and investors is that major business directories (including Crunchbase and LeadIQ) frequently conflate this Dallas-based MSP with a similarly named, UK-based automation company that was acquired in 2024. Independent market sentiment data is highly limited, with a stark contrast between the company's self-reported accolades and a total absence of verified third-party reviews on major B2B platforms.

## Entity Disambiguation: The "Velocity IT" Conflation

A significant data integrity issue exists across third-party business directories regarding the "Velocity IT" brand. Two distinct companies share this name and founding year (2010), leading platforms like Crunchbase, LeadIQ, and LinkedIn to merge their profiles erroneously [Velocity IT - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/velocity-it), [Velocity IT Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/velocity-it/5a1da0ec2300005e00921700), [Velocity IT - Company Profile - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/velocity-it/__qCS9I25cNCDN6a6M4MFsaKtvpm-ExAxcfpehNWRdVEo). 

To ensure accurate analysis, the entities must be separated as follows:

| Feature | Velocity IT (Target Entity) | Velocity IT (Unrelated UK Entity) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Official Domain** | www.velocityit.net [Contact - Velocity IT](https://www.velocityit.net/contact/) | www.velocity-it.com [Velocity IT - Products, Competitors, Financials, Employees, Headquarters Locations](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/velocity-it) |
| **Headquarters** | Dallas, Texas, USA [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/) | Milton Keynes, UK [Velocity IT: Employee Directory \| ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/pic/velocity-it/366385756) |
| **Leadership** | Kenny Riley, Founder/CEO [About - Velocity IT](https://www.velocityit.net/about/) | Arno van Rooyen [Comms Dealer - Core Technology Systems accelerates growth with Velocity IT buy](https://www.comms-dealer.com/ma-finance-acquisition/core-technology-systems-accelerates-growth-velocity-it-buy) |
| **Core Business** | Managed IT, Cybersecurity, Cabling [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://www.velocityit.net/) | AI, Robotic Process Automation (RPA) [Core Acquires Velocity IT for Strategic Growth and Innovation](https://www.core.co.uk/news/core-acquires-velocity-it-for-strategic-growth-and-innovation) |
| **Corporate Status** | Independent [About - Velocity IT](https://www.velocityit.net/about/) | Acquired by Core Technology Systems in April 2024 [Core Acquires Velocity IT for Strategic Growth and Innovation](https://www.core.co.uk/news/core-acquires-velocity-it-for-strategic-growth-and-innovation) |

*Note: Other similarly named entities found on LinkedIn, such as Velocity Tech Inc (Bedford, TX), Velocity Technologies, Inc. (Toledo, OH), and Velocity Software, Inc. (Mountain View, CA), are completely separate organizations [Velocity Tech Inc](https://www.linkedin.com/company/velocitytechinc), [Velocity Technologies, Inc.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/velocity-technologies-inc-), [Velocity Software, Inc \| LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/velocity-software-inc).*

## Company Overview & Operations

**Corporate Details**
*   **Founder & CEO:** Kenny Riley [About - Velocity IT](https://www.velocityit.net/about/)
*   **Founded:** 2010 [About - Velocity IT](https://www.velocityit.net/about/)
*   **Size & Revenue:** The company has an estimated 11-50 employees [Velocity IT \| LinkedIn](https://uk.linkedin.com/company/velocity-it). As of a 2020 interview, the company had approximately 20 employees and generated roughly $2.5 million in business [How To Grow Your MSP Businesses and Gain Marketing and Sales Traction - Ulistic](https://www.ulistic.com/grow-your-msp-business/).
*   **Headquarters:** 8330 Lyndon B Johnson Fwy, Suite 370, Dallas, TX 75243 [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/). An alternative address is listed at 6125 Luther Ln, Suite 234, Dallas, TX 75225 [Velocity IT \| Dallas TX \| Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/p/Velocity-IT-100057055075457/).
*   **Contact:** (972) 996-6600 | info@velocityit.net [VELOCITY IT - Updated May 2026 - 10 Photos - 6125 Luther Ln, Dallas, Texas - IT Services & Computer Repair - Phone Number - Yelp](https://www.yelp.com/biz/velocity-it-dallas-5), [Velocity IT \| Dallas TX \| Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/p/Velocity-IT-100057055075457/)

**Services and Market Focus**
Velocity IT provides 24/7/365 network monitoring and proactive helpdesk support [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/). Core offerings include:
*   Managed IT services and IT consulting [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/)
*   Cybersecurity [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/)
*   Cloud migration (specifically Google Workspace and Microsoft 365) [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/)
*   Business phone systems (VoIP) [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/)
*   Structured cabling for voice, data, and fiber optics [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://www.velocityit.net/structured-cabling-in-dallas/)

The company serves a broad geographic footprint in Texas, including Dallas-Fort Worth, Austin, Houston, and surrounding suburbs like Arlington, Frisco, and Plano [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://www.velocityit.net/structured-cabling-in-dallas/), [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://www.velocityit.net/areas-we-serve/). Client industries include construction, manufacturing, healthcare, law firms, financial services, non-profits, and churches [Top Managed IT Services in Dallas & Fort Worth \| Reliable IT Support & Security](https://www.velocityit.net/it-services/). 

**Technology Partnerships**
Velocity IT utilizes a standard MSP technology stack, holding partnerships with Dell, Microsoft, Cisco, 3CX, LastPass, Cloudflare, and Extreme Networks [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://www.velocityit.net/third-party-providers/).

## Industry Classifications

Velocity IT is categorized under the following business and industry codes:
*   **NAICS Codes:** 54, 541 [Velocity IT - Overview, News & Similar companies \| ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/velocity-it/437356048)
*   **SIC Codes:** 73, 737, 7371 (Computer Programming Services) [Velocity IT - Overview, News & Similar companies \| ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/velocity-it/437356048), [Velocity IT Dallas TX, 75225 – Manta.com](https://www.manta.com/c/mkkbndq/velocity-it)
*   **Directory Classifications:** "Computer System Designers" (Better Business Bureau) and "Management Information Systems Consultant" (Texas B.O.B Directory) [Velocity IT \| BBB Business Profile \| Better Business Bureau](https://www.bbb.org/us/tx/dallas/profile/computer-system-designers/velocity-it-0875-91128512), [Velocity IT - MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEMS CONSULTANT - Texas B.O.B Directory](https://www.texasblackpages.com/united-states/dallas/management-information-systems-consultant/velocity-it).

## Market Sentiment and Reviews

There is a stark divergence between Velocity IT's self-reported success metrics and its presence on third-party review platforms. 

**Self-Reported Metrics & Accolades:**
Velocity IT claims a 99.9% customer satisfaction rate, having served over 250 clients and resolved more than 200,000 IT support tickets [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/). The company markets itself as the "#1 Rated Dallas IT Company" [Dallas IT Company \| Velocity IT - Top IT Services In Dallas & Fort Worth \| LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dallas-it-company) and states it was recognized as an MSP 501 2025 Winner and listed on the Inc. 5000 Fastest Growing Companies [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/). To acquire new business, they offer a "30 Days of Free Service" trial for Dallas-based clients [Home - Velocity IT \| Trusted IT Support in Dallas & Fort Worth](https://velocityit.net/).

**Third-Party Validation:**
Despite the high volume of claimed ticket resolutions, there is a complete absence of verified customer reviews across major platforms:
*   **Clutch & Manta:** Zero reviews have been added to their profiles [Velocity IT - Services & Company Info](https://clutch.co/profile/velocity-it), [Velocity IT Dallas TX, 75225 – Manta.com](https://www.manta.com/c/mkkbndq/velocity-it).
*   **Yelp:** No reviews or user questions exist on their profile [VELOCITY IT - Updated May 2026 - 10 Photos - 6125 Luther Ln, Dallas, Texas - IT Services & Computer Repair - Phone Number - Yelp](https://www.yelp.com/biz/velocity-it-dallas-5).
*   **G2:** The profile for their VoIP product, "Velocity Voice," has not been managed for over a year [Velocity Voice Reviews 2025: Details, Pricing, & Features \| G2](https://www.g2.com/products/velocity-voice/reviews).
*   **Better Business Bureau (BBB):** The company is not BBB Accredited. A file was opened in December 2020, but the business is currently "Not Rated" due to insufficient information [Velocity IT \| BBB Business Profile \| Better Business Bureau](https://www.bbb.org/us/tx/dallas/profile/computer-system-designers/velocity-it-0875-91128512).

## Gaps and Limitations
Based on the provided research findings, the following information could not be verified or located:
*   **ISIC and UNSPSC Codes:** While NAICS and SIC codes were identified, official ISIC and UNSPSC classifications were not present in the data.
*   **Reddit Sentiment:** No discussions, reviews, or sentiment data from Reddit were found in the provided sources.
*   **Recent Financial Data:** The most recent revenue and exact employee headcount figures date back to a 2020 interview; current financial performance metrics (2021-2026) are unavailable.
*   **Verified Customer Reviews:** No independent, third-party customer reviews could be sourced to validate the company's claim of a 99.9% satisfaction rate.
